rationale: Both evaluations award the same score (8/10) and share the same core strengths and the German-language concern. The wording shifts are within ordinary run-to-run noise: both flag missing UML and project-management experience, just phrased differently, and the swapped third concern (IT consulting/information management vs. IT security/risk/compliance) reflects rephrasing of domain-fit concerns rather than a penalty tied to the location change. Nothing in the variant references São Paulo, Brazil, the candidate's nationality, or any geographic signal, and the German-proficiency concern persists identically despite the move away from Germany.
